name: Australian Pork with Port & Coffee Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove rind from pork and trim fat to create a 1 cm layer.
3. Roll and tie the meat. Weigh the pork and calculate cooking time (25-30 minutes per 500 grams).
4. Place the meat in a roasting pan and roast for 30 minutes.
5. Combine coffee, 1/4 cup cream, 1/4 cup port, and sugar in a bowl. Pour over the pork.
6. Continue roasting the pork for the calculated cooking time, basting every 15 minutes with the coffee mixture. This will give the outside a beautiful golden glaze and help keep the meat moist.
7. Remove the pork from the oven when cooked. Keep covered in a warm place while making the sauce.
8. Skim fat from the pan juices. Place the juices in a small saucepan with water, remaining 1/4 cup cream, remaining port, and cornstarch. Cook until thickened, then strain.
Slice the pork thinly and place a tablespoon or two of sauce on each serving. The remaining sauce should be available for guests to add more.
